title: evolvulus alsinoides var. linifolius
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. linifolius, also known as dwarf morning glory or slender dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia, characterized by its delicate blue flowers and slender foliage. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Evolvulus alsinoides var. linifolius include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable plant for traditional medicine. Evolvulus alsinoides var. linifolius is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used topically as a poultice or ointment to treat various health conditions.
